Name: ChatGPT
Aiprosol verdict: Default for general assistance. Best quality below $30/mo.

Name: Claude
Aiprosol verdict: Best for long-context reading, careful analysis, writing.
Gotchas: Free tier rate-limits frustrate power users.

Name: Gemini
Aiprosol verdict: Strong for Google ecosystem integration; weaker for code.
Gotchas: Hallucinates more than peers in benchmarks.

Name: Perplexity
Aiprosol verdict: Best for research questions needing citations.
Gotchas: Less good for pure reasoning vs ChatGPT/Claude.

Name: Poe
Aiprosol verdict: Switch between 20+ models in one UI.

Name: Anthropic API
Aiprosol verdict: Best for production apps needing high quality + safety.
Gotchas: Cost can blow up on long contexts.

Name: OpenAI API
Aiprosol verdict: Industry default API; best tooling ecosystem.

Name: Replicate
Aiprosol verdict: Run any open-source model on demand.

Name: Together AI
Gotchas: Less mature than OpenAI API tooling.

Name: Claude Code
Aiprosol verdict: Aiprosol's pick for production. Reads codebases, writes commits.

Name: Cursor
Aiprosol verdict: VS Code fork with deep AI integration. Best multi-line edits.

Name: Windsurf
Aiprosol verdict: Cleaner UI than Cursor. Codeium underneath.

Name: GitHub Copilot
Aiprosol verdict: Best for autocomplete within existing IDE workflows.
Gotchas: Weaker on multi-file edits vs Cursor.

Name: Codeium
Aiprosol verdict: Free tier for individuals. Good enough autocomplete.

Name: v0 (Vercel)
Aiprosol verdict: Generate React + Tailwind UI from a prompt. Aiprosol uses it.

Name: Midjourney
Gotchas: Discord interface; no API until v6.1.

Name: Stable Diffusion 3
Aiprosol verdict: Run locally; full control; open weights.

Name: Ideogram
Aiprosol verdict: Best at rendering text inside images (logos, posters).

Name: Adobe Firefly
Aiprosol verdict: Commercially safe training data. Strong for brand work.

Name: HeyGen
Aiprosol verdict: Faster + cheaper than Synthesia. Real-time avatar streams.

Name: Whisper API
Aiprosol verdict: Default for transcription. Aiprosol uses it.
Gotchas: Slower than purpose-built services for live.

Name: AssemblyAI
Gotchas: Pricier than Whisper if you don't need extras.

Name: Deepgram
Gotchas: Quality slightly below Whisper for non-English.

Name: Notion AI
Aiprosol verdict: Best if you already use Notion. Cross-page Q&A.

Name: Glean
Aiprosol verdict: Enterprise knowledge search across all SaaS.

Name: n8n
Aiprosol verdict: Aiprosol's primary. Self-host; no per-task limits.

Name: Make.com
Aiprosol verdict: Best visual editor; more powerful than Zapier.

Name: Pipedream
Aiprosol verdict: Best when you need code escape hatch.

Name: Bardeen
Aiprosol verdict: Run automations in your browser. Good for scraping.

Name: HubSpot
Aiprosol verdict: Best free CRM tier. Aiprosol uses it.

Name: Pipedrive
Aiprosol verdict: Cleaner UX than HubSpot for small sales teams.

Name: Close
Aiprosol verdict: Best for high-velocity inside sales (built-in dialer).

Name: Attio
Aiprosol verdict: Modern CRM with relations + custom objects.

Name: Folk
Aiprosol verdict: Best for solo founders + early sales teams.

Name: Mailchimp
Gotchas: Pricing scales poorly with list size.

Name: Mixpanel
Gotchas: Costs balloon with high event volume.

Name: Notion
Gotchas: Slower than dedicated tools at scale.

Name: Monday.com
Aiprosol verdict: Best visual workflows for non-tech teams.

Name: Coda
Aiprosol verdict: Best for ops teams needing doc + DB combo.

Name: Plain
Aiprosol verdict: Best UX for technical support teams.

Name: Pylon
Aiprosol verdict: Best for managing customer Slack channels.

Name: Crisp
Aiprosol verdict: Best free tier for very small teams.
Gotchas: Less powerful than peers at scale.

Name: Groq
Aiprosol verdict: Aiprosol uses for chat widget. Sub-100ms.

Name: Phi-4
Aiprosol verdict: Small enough to run on laptops.

Name: Hugging Face Spaces
Aiprosol verdict: Try any open-source model in browser.

Name: Forefront AI
Aiprosol verdict: One API for multiple model providers.

Name: Cognition Devin
Gotchas: Quality below human SWE in benchmarks.

Name: Granola
Aiprosol verdict: Macbook native, no bot in calls.

Name: Clearbit
Gotchas: Acquired by HubSpot; pricing in flux.

Name: ConvertKit
Gotchas: Less powerful than peers at scale.

Name: Netlify
Gotchas: Pricier than Vercel for some cases.
